name: Baarwan Khiladi
overview: A story about a small-town boy, Akbar, who loves cricket and has dream's to play on a national level all his life. His passion leads to his selection in the country’s biggest cricket national league, Lahore Cricket League; upon his journey, he gets to experience it all – the fight against the unjust system, dirty politics, and bias in the industry.

trailers.title: Baarwan Khiladi - Official Trailer - Tapmad Original
